mapper.sql: article_id, user_id, article_title, article_content, article_date, article_cover, article_good, article_reply, article_scan, article_tag, article_category_id, article_general
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from articles
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into articles
article_id,
user_id,
article_title,
article_content,
article_date,
article_cover,
article_good,
article_reply,
article_scan,
article_tag,
article_category_id,
article_general,
#{articleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{articleTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{articleContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{articleDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{articleGood,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{articleReply,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{articleScan,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{articleTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{articleCategoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{articleGeneral,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update articles
article_id = #{record.articleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_title = #{record.articleTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_content = #{record.articleContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_date = #{record.articleDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
article_cover = #{record.articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_good = #{record.articleGood,jdbcType=INTEGER},
article_reply = #{record.articleReply,jdbcType=INTEGER},
article_scan = #{record.articleScan,jdbcType=INTEGER},
article_tag = #{record.articleTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_category_id = #{record.articleCategoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_general = #{record.articleGeneral,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update articles set article_id = #{record.articleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_title = #{record.articleTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_content = #{record.articleContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_date = #{record.articleDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, article_cover = #{record.articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_good = #{record.articleGood,jdbcType=INTEGER}, article_reply = #{record.articleReply,jdbcType=INTEGER}, article_scan = #{record.articleScan,jdbcType=INTEGER}, article_tag = #{record.articleTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_category_id = #{record.articleCategoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_general = #{record.articleGeneral,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update articles
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_title = #{articleTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_content = #{articleContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_date = #{articleDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
article_cover = #{articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_good = #{articleGood,jdbcType=INTEGER},
article_reply = #{articleReply,jdbcType=INTEGER},
article_scan = #{articleScan,jdbcType=INTEGER},
article_tag = #{articleTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_category_id = #{articleCategoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_general = #{articleGeneral,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where article_id = #{articleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update articles set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_title = #{articleTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_content = #{articleContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_date = #{articleDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, article_cover = #{articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_good = #{articleGood,jdbcType=INTEGER}, article_reply = #{articleReply,jdbcType=INTEGER}, article_scan = #{articleScan,jdbcType=INTEGER}, article_tag = #{articleTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_category_id = #{articleCategoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_general = #{articleGeneral,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where article_id = #{articleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
